docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF AMY OSTRIE IS PRESENT VIA COURT CALL. DEFENDANT VALENTINA YASINSKY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OSTRIE, AMY AS TO DEFENDANT YASINSKY, VALENTINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-23-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YASINSKY, VALENTINA
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSTRIE, AMY
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OSTRIE, AMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSTRIE, AMY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT YASINSKY, VALENTINA THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF OR THAT DEFENDANT'S TREATMENT OF PLAINTIFF FELL BELOW THE APPLICABLE STANDARD OF CARE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 4/11/17/. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
